'''Selton''' was a city located on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Dren Melne]] was born in this city.<ref name="The Starfighter Trap" />
